title: T9 batch Gemini review + cite-coverage verification + MEMORY.md SHIPPED entry
description: Per feedback_review_batching: ONE Gemini review at end of rc, not per-task. Review full rc.22 diff against rc.21 base, run `fab doctor --cite-coverage` to confirm cite policy still active (rc.20), then update MEMORY.md with rc.22 SHIPPED entry covering all 5 scopes.

files.change: Run Gemini review (e.g., `ccw cli --tool gemini --mode analysis` with appropriate prompt) over the rc.22 diff. Capture findings in `${SESSION}/gemini-review.md`. Address any critical issues before tagging.
Run `fab doctor --cite-coverage` and confirm output shows cite-policy still active (>0 cite_policy_activated or related events in recent window)

files.target: rc.22 ledger-rotation entry (or add new SHIPPED entry)
files.change: Replace the pending rc.22 entry (which currently mentions only ledger rotation per project_rc22_plan.md) with a 'rc.22 SHIPPED YYYY-MM-DD' entry covering all 5 scopes: A (ledger rotation + 50MB warn), B (baseline filename id-prefix + lint rule), C (baseline tags []), D (read-side auto-heal + hook banner), E (reconcile dual-root + revision-drift force-write). Link to relevant memory files. Date should be the actual ship date.
Capture Gemini review findings (clean, minor, or critical) for the rc.22 PR/tag record

implementation: Generate rc.22 diff: `git diff v2.0.0-rc.21..HEAD` (or appropriate tag base)
Run Gemini review via ccw cli with planning-mode prompt — focus on cross-scope interactions (especially A↔D event emission paths, D↔E reconcile/auto-heal overlap, B↔scan idempotency)
Capture results in `${SESSION}/gemini-review.md` — categorize as critical / minor / clean
If critical findings: cycle back to relevant task (do NOT tag until resolved)
Run `fab doctor --cite-coverage` — verify cite policy still active
Update MEMORY.md with rc.22 SHIPPED entry
Update project_rc22_plan.md (or add a sibling memory file) marking rc.22 as shipped if needed
Hand off to release-rc skill for the actual tag/publish cadence (NOT done in this task — separate ceremony)

reference.examples: rc.20 used single Gemini sweep at end + cite-coverage verify — mirror that flow

criteria: Gemini review run produces a review.md artifact with critical/minor/clean classification
Zero unresolved critical findings (or all resolved before tagging)
`fab doctor --cite-coverage` shows cite policy still active (>0 events in expected window)
MEMORY.md updated with rc.22 SHIPPED entry covering all 5 scopes
Release ceremony handed off to release-rc skill (NOT this task's responsibility)

rationale.chosen_approach: One Gemini sweep at end + automated cite-coverage check + memory update
decision_factors: Cross-scope review catches issues that per-task review misses
MEMORY.md update keeps future sessions accurate
rationale.tradeoffs: Single point of failure if Gemini API hiccups (mitigated by falling back to Qwen per agent fallback chain)

manual_checks: Review gemini-review.md output for false positives
